description: The BreadcrumbManager component is used to instantiate BreadcrumbInterfaces and remove them based on the list of path elements on a Data Feed View Type.

fields.Path: The path field in a Data Feed View Type component to show in the form of templates.
fields.UI_Root: The place to put Breadcrumb path items in.
fields.BreadcrumbTemplate: The template to duplicate in order to create UI.
fields.SeparatorTemplate: The slot to duplicate and place between elements to make them have slashes or commas between them.

methods.SetDepth: Takes a number beside a button that when pressed will set the depth of the path.
methods.SetupTemplate: Handles setting up a template for this component for a simple settup.
